top20.sql:
-- [sp+F&D]
WITH stats AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2025-07-01')
        OR a.likes >= 5000
        OR a.views >= 50000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS kept_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL
                  AND ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2025-07-01')
        OR a.likes >= 5000
        OR a.views >= 50000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_kept_count
    FROM hifen.instagram_post a
    LEFT JOIN hifen.instagram_user_stat b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM hifen.instagram_ppl_brand
    ) c ON a.post_id = c.post_id
)
SELECT 
    total_count AS '전체_데이터_수',
    kept_count AS '필터통과_데이터_수',
    ad_total_count AS '전체_광고_수(정답지)',
    ad_kept_count AS '필터통과_광고_수',
    CONCAT(ROUND((ad_kept_count / ad_total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '리콜_Recall(%)',
    CONCAT(ROUND(((total_count - kept_count) / total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '제거율_Removal(%)'
FROM stats;

    kept_count AS '필터통과_데이터_수',
    ad_total_count AS '전체_광고_수(정답지)',
    ad_kept_count AS '필터통과_광고_수',
    CONCAT(ROUND((ad_kept_count / ad_total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '리콜_Recall(%)',
    CONCAT(ROUND(((total_count - kept_count) / total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '제거율_Removal(%)'
FROM stats;

-- [sp+F&D]
WITH stats AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2023-01-01')
        OR a.likes >= 5000
        OR a.views >= 50000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS kept_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL
                  AND ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2023-01-01')
        OR a.likes >= 5000
        OR a.views >= 50000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_kept_count
    FROM hifen.instagram_post a
    LEFT JOIN hifen.instagram_user_stat b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM hifen.instagram_ppl_brand
    ) c ON a.post_id = c.post_id
)
SELECT 
    total_count AS '전체_데이터_수',
    kept_count AS '필터통과_데이터_수',
    ad_total_count AS '전체_광고_수(정답지)',
    ad_kept_count AS '필터통과_광고_수',
    CONCAT(ROUND((ad_kept_count / ad_total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '리콜_Recall(%)',
    CONCAT(ROUND(((total_count - kept_count) / total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '제거율_Removal(%)'
FROM stats;

        COUNT(*) AS total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2025-07-01')
        OR a.likes >= 2000
        OR a.views >= 40000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS kept_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL
                  AND ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2025-07-01')
        OR a.likes >= 2000
        OR a.views >= 40000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_kept_count
    FROM hifen.instagram_post a
    LEFT JOIN hifen.instagram_user_stat b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM hifen.instagram_ppl_brand
    ) c ON a.post_id = c.post_id
)
SELECT 
    total_count AS '전체_데이터_수',
    kept_count AS '필터통과_데이터_수',
    ad_total_count AS '전체_광고_수(정답지)',
    ad_kept_count AS '필터통과_광고_수',
    CONCAT(ROUND((ad_kept_count / ad_total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '리콜_Recall(%)',
    CONCAT(ROUND(((total_count - kept_count) / total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '제거율_Removal(%)'
FROM stats;

        COUNT(*) AS total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2025-01-01')
        OR a.likes >= 2000
        OR a.views >= 28000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS kept_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL
                  AND ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR (b.followers >= 80302 AND a.publish_date >= '2025-01-01')
        OR a.likes >= 2000
        OR a.views >= 28000) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_kept_count
    FROM hifen.instagram_post a
    LEFT JOIN hifen.instagram_user_stat b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM hifen.instagram_ppl_brand
    ) c ON a.post_id = c.post_id
)
SELECT 
    total_count AS '전체_데이터_수',
    kept_count AS '필터통과_데이터_수',
    ad_total_count AS '전체_광고_수(정답지)',
    ad_kept_count AS '필터통과_광고_수',
    CONCAT(ROUND((ad_kept_count / ad_total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '리콜_Recall(%)',
    CONCAT(ROUND(((total_count - kept_count) / total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '제거율_Removal(%)'
FROM stats;

        COUNT(*) AS total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR a.views >= 6000
        OR a.likes >= 2000
        OR b.followers >= 80302) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS kept_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_total_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.post_id IS NOT NULL
                  AND ((a.is_sponsored = 1 OR a.is_ppl = 1)
        OR a.views >= 6000
        OR a.likes >= 2000
        OR b.followers >= 80302) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ad_kept_count
    FROM hifen.instagram_post a
    LEFT JOIN hifen.instagram_user_stat b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM hifen.instagram_ppl_brand
    ) c ON a.post_id = c.post_id
)
SELECT 
    total_count AS '전체_데이터_수',
    kept_count AS '필터통과_데이터_수',
    ad_total_count AS '전체_광고_수(정답지)',
    ad_kept_count AS '필터통과_광고_수',
    CONCAT(ROUND((ad_kept_count / ad_total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '리콜_Recall(%)',
    CONCAT(ROUND(((total_count - kept_count) / total_count) * 100, 2), '%') AS '제거율_Removal(%)'
FROM stats;
